note: Improved sanitation facilities include flush/pour flush toilets (to piped sewer system, septic tank, pit latrine), ventilated improved pit (VIP) latrines, pit latrines with a slab, and composting toilets.
title: People not using improved sanitation facilities
subtitle: Improved sanitation facilities are those designed to hygienically separate excreta from human contact. If no [improved sanitation facility](#dod:improved-sanitation) is available, people might practice [open defecation](#dod:sanitation-open-defecation) or use [unimproved sanitation facilities](#dod:sanitation-unimproved).
